Careers at Norsteel
Join our winning team at North America’s leading provider of commercial, industrial, and residential steel buildings.

The Norsteel Team of Professionals

When you join Norsteel, you are joining an incredible team of industry veterans who care about what they do. We foster an inclusive and understanding work environment, and encourage an open-door policy.

With various group events scheduled throughout the year, we are a tight-knit community of passionate individuals who go out of our way to help our customers and our coworkers. Here are just a few benefits of working with Norsteel:

Dynamic and supportive work enviornment
Opportunity for growth - we promote from within
Immersive and extensive training
Uncapped rewarding commission structure for sales roles
Warm leads with quick turnaround times
Diverse Talent, One Strong Team

At Norsteel, we believe in building not just strong structures but strong teams. We welcome individuals of all experience levels, providing suitable roles, comprehensive training, and growth opportunities to help you succeed.
